ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stream the task belongs to */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the task in nanoseconds */,
  "duration_time" INTEGER /* Duration of the task in seconds */,
  "wait_time" INTEGER /* Wait time of the task in nanoseconds */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device executing the task */,
  "iter_id" INTEGER /* Iteration ID of the task */,
  "tasktype" INTEGER /* Type of task */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the task was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the task */,
  "priority" TEXT /* The priority level of the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_iter_id FOREIGN KEY ("iter_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("stream_id") REFERENCES streams ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_tasktype FOREIGN KEY ("tasktype") REFERENCES task_types ("tasktype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streams" (
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stream */,
  "stream_name" TEXT /* Name of the stream */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stream */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the stream */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the stream was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the stream was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device */,
  "device_specifications" TEXT /* Detailed specifications of the device */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* The current status of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_types" (
  "tasktype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task type */,
  "tasktype_name" TEXT /* Name of the task type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task type */,
  "task_type_category" TEXT /* The category of the task type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tasktype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iterations" (
  "iter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each iteration */,
  "iter_name" TEXT /* Name of the iteration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the iteration */,
  "iteration_number" INTEGER /* The iteration number in a sequence of iterations */,
  "iteration_status" TEXT /* The status of the iteration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "password_reset_token" TEXT /* A token for resetting the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* The unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_metrics_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the log belongs to */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time of the log in nanoseconds */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* The log level of the message */,
  "log_content" TEXT /* The content of the log message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_logs_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_tasks" (
  "user_task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-task assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the task is assigned to */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* The date when the task was assigned to the user */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* The due date for the task */,
  "task_status" TEXT /* The status of the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_tasks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_tasks_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task that depends on another task */,
  "dependent_task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task that is depended on */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* The type of dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_dependencies_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_dependencies_dependent_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)
